title: AeroRule RuleSet
description: Defines a group of rules to be evaluated together with a specific execution strategy

name.description: Short, human-readable name of the ruleset

description.description: Human-readable description of the ruleset's purpose

executionStrategy.description: ALL = evaluate every rule and collect all traces. GATED = evaluate in order and stop on first failure.

rules.description: Ordered list of rules to evaluate
